commands.review_summary:
The PR lets explicit Discord status reactions keep receiving tool lifecycle callbacks in message_tool_only replies while suppressing default verbose tool-summary text, and adds a regression test for that path.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +44. Total +48 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can have explicit Discord status reactions active in message_tool_only mode, but progress callbacks are only allowed when progress draft streaming is active. I did not run a live Discord reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair lane is needed; the patch has no blocking code finding, and the remaining blocker is contributor or Mantis real behavior proof.

target.title: fix: keep Discord status reactions active in tool-only replies
target.body:
## Summary
- keep Discord status-reaction lifecycle callbacks active for explicit `message_tool_only` replies
- treat Discord status reactions as quiet channel-owned progress so verbose tool-summary text stays suppressed
- add a regression test covering tool execution reactions in always-on guild replies

## Testing
- NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 pnpm vitest run extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts -t "keeps explicit message-tool-only Discord status reactions active across tool execution" *(initial run failed before expectation fix; subsequent targeted runs in this workspace stalled after rolldown plugin timing output)*
- pnpm exec tsx -e "import './extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts'; console.log('tsx-import-ok')"
target.author: arkyu2077
